no: Item Revisions v4beta10sd19 (G3 v4b10 + SubtleDoctor patches). Comprehensive item overhaul — 790+ items changed. Main component (cn:0) conflicts with many mods but SCS and aTweaks have built-in detection (install IR first). Standalone tweaks cn:1060 (Kensai Bracers) and cn:1070 (Thief Wands) are safe to cherry-pick with zero conflicts

conflicts.reason: 6 FA components use REQUIRE_PREDICATE !MOD_IS_INSTALLED setup-item_rev.tp2 cn:0 — auto-skip if IR main installed. FA cn:26 also checks IR cn:1040/1042. Hard conflict only if IR main (cn:0) is selected alongside these FA components. cn:10 (NWN2 Weapons) has no IR check — always safe.
conflicts.theirComps: #4 Stat Items #19 Nerf APR #21 Update Existing #23 #24 Crit Immunity #25 Set Bonuses #26 Armor Overhaul
conflicts.source: FA tp2 REQUIRE_PREDICATE !MOD_IS_INSTALLED on cn:4/19/21/23/24/25; cn:26 checks IR 1040/1042, 2026-04

conflicts.reason: SCS has built-in IR detection code. Install IR BEFORE SCS. SCS silently skips overlapping features. Item Revisions and SCS overlap
IR detects aTweaks and adjusts. Install order dependent. Item Revisions and aTweaks overlap
Item Revisions and weapon tweaks overlap
Item Revisions conflict with Item Tweaks
Item Revisions conflict with Unique Artifacts
FnP Multiclass Druids conflicts with IR's weapon restriction removal for clerics
IR main component conflicts with Extended ToB Item Descriptions
Alter effects of CHA stat (store prices)
conflicts.theirComps: #2180 Store prices #2140 Spellcasting in Armor #2150 Thievery in Armor

conflicts.reason: Removing stat requirements conflicts with Item Revisions' rebalanced item requirements
FPPS tp2 uses FORBID_COMPONENT for Item Revisions armor components. Mutually exclusive
conflicts.myComps: #6 #7 #8 Heavy Armor Encumbrance #9 Allow Thieving in Armor
conflicts.theirComps: #1 Between You And Harm (alternate armour system)

conflicts.reason: IR main (cn:0) rewrites item files that SD IT also patches. IR main — cn:1060/1070 standalone tweaks. SD IT cn:111 (Aesthetic), cn:120 (Weapons), cn:1020 (Missile Deflection), cn:1051 (Rod of Absorption) don't touch bracer usability or wand restrictions. No conflict in current preset.
conflicts.theirComps: #100 YARAS #111 #112 Aesthetic #120 Weapons #1020 Missile Deflection #1051 #1052 Rod of Absorption
conflicts.myComps: #0 Item Revisions main (NOT in Ultimate preset)
conflicts.source: IR cn:0 COPY on item files; SD IT COPY_EXISTING patches; cn:1060/1070 modify CLAB/usability only, 2026-04

conflicts.reason: Both mods modify the same vorpal weapon items (Silver Sword, Axe of the Unyielding, Ravager). Polyvorp replaces vorpal effects with its own spell-based system; IR reworks the items entirely. Results are unpredictable.
Reported incompatible by LCC-docs database (lcc id 562 vs 541)

sum: Comprehensive overhaul of hundreds of items in BG2, rebalancing weapons, armor, and accessories to be more distinct and interesting. Changes item stats, descriptions, and effects.

1092.desc: Fighter/Cleric multiclass proficiency capped at Specialized (2 pips)

1093.desc: Fighter/Cleric and Fighter/Druid multiclass proficiency capped at 2 pips

1095.desc: Fighter/Druid multiclass proficiency capped at Specialized (2 pips)

co.n: Item Revisions by Demivrgvs
co.no: Core overhaul: modifies ~790 items (stats, effects, descriptions, prices). Install BEFORE SCS. SCS v33+ has built-in IR detection. v4beta10sd19 is most patched version. Community opinion mixed on iconic item nerfs (Belm, Carsomyr, FoA)

co.n: Store Revisions
co.no: Overhauls store inventories. Optional masterwork weapons (off by default in settings.ini). Independent of main component

co.n: Revised Armor: With Movement Speed Penalties
co.no: Graduated armor penalties: DEX, speed factor, phys resistance, per-damage-type AC. More nuanced than YARAS or cdtweaks. Incompatible with Full Plate & Packing Steel (FORBID)

co.n: Revised Armor: Without Movement Speed Penalties
co.no: Same as cn:1040 but without movement speed penalties. Less punishing option

co.n: Allow Spellcasting in Armor: With a Chance of Arcane Casting Failure
co.no: Arcane spell failure chance by armor weight (0% Elven Chain to 50% Full Plate). More nuanced than cdtweaks binary allow/deny
co.tp2n: With a Chance of Arcane Casting Failure

co.n: Allow Spellcasting in Armor: With Casting Speed Penalties for Arcane Casters
co.no: Casting speed penalties instead of failure chance. Optional: extends to divine casters via settings.ini
co.tp2n: With Casting Speed Penalties for Arcane Casters

co.n: Allow Thieving Skills in Armor: Stealth Penalized by Armor
co.no: Graduated stealth penalties by armor weight. More nuanced than cdtweaks (no penalty) or YARAS (bundled)

co.n: Allow Thieving Skills in Armor: Stealth Penalized by Armor and Shields
co.no: Same as cn:9 but shields also penalize stealth
co.tp2n: Stealth is Penalized by Armor and Shields

co.n: Revised Shield Bonuses
co.no: Rebalances shield AC values and abilities. Standalone, no conflicts

co.n: Weapon Changes
co.no: Changes base weapon type stats globally (speed factors, damage dice). Hard-blocked by cdtweaks weapon changes. Slings nerfed (speed 6→10), daggers buffed (speed 2→1), bolts buffed (1d8→1d10)

co.n: Enchantment Doesn't Affect Speed Factor of Weapons
co.no: Removes speed factor reduction from magical enchantment. Makes speed depend only on weapon type. Conflicts with proficiency overhauls
co.tp2n: Enchantment Doesn't Affect Speed Factor of Weapons

co.n: Dual Wielding Changes for Light and Heavy Weapons
co.no: Light weapons (+1 off-hand THAC0) vs heavy weapons (-1 penalty) for dual-wielding. Smart PnP-inspired change. Well received
co.tp2n: Dual Wielding Changes for Light and Heavy Weapons

co.n: Revised Backstabbing: Thief-only Weapons
co.no: Backstab restricted to thief-only weapons with multiplier penalties by weapon weight. Compatible with Rogue Rebalancing (different axes)

co.n: Revised Backstabbing: More Weapons Usable for Backstabbing
co.no: More weapons usable for backstabbing. Less restrictive than cn:18

co.n: Revised Backstabbing: All Melee and Ranged Weapons Usable for Backstabbing
co.no: All melee and ranged weapons can backstab. Most permissive option
co.tp2n: All Melee and Ranged Weapons Usable For Backstabbing

co.n: Revised Critical Hit Aversion
co.no: Revised critical hit immunity from helmets. Requires EE engine

co.n: Items of Protection Can Be Worn with Magical Armor
co.no: Protection items (rings/cloaks) can be worn with magical armor. Same as Forgotten Armament. Last-installed-wins with cdtweaks
co.tp2n: Items of Protection Can Be Worn with Magical Armor

co.n: Multiclass Divine Weapon Restrictions: Clerics Only
co.no: Multiclass Fighter/Clerics can use non-blunt weapons. Conflicts with FnP multiclass approach
co.scn: Remove Weapon Restrictions from Multi-classed Divine Spellcasters

co.n: Multiclass Divine Weapon Restrictions: Clerics and Druids
co.scn: Remove Weapon Restrictions from Multi-classed Divine Spellcasters
co.no: Both Clerics and Druids can use non-blunt weapons

co.n: Multiclass Divine Weapon Restrictions: Clerics Only, Halved Specialization
co.scn: Remove Weapon Restrictions from Multi-classed Divine Spellcasters
co.no: Clerics can use non-blunt but proficiency capped at **

co.n: Multiclass Divine Weapon Restrictions: Clerics and Druids, Halved Specialization
co.scn: Remove Weapon Restrictions from Multi-classed Divine Spellcasters
co.no: Both Clerics and Druids, proficiency capped at **
co.tp2n: Clerics and Druids, With Halved Specialization

co.n: PnP Equipment for Druids: Druids Only
co.no: Restricts druids to PnP equipment (no metal armor, specific weapons). Druids only

co.n: PnP Equipment for Druids: Druids and Fighter/Druids
co.no: Same as cn:15 but includes Fighter/Druids

co.n: Kensai Can Wear Bracers
co.no: Removes bracer/glove restriction from Kensai. Pure usability fix, no stat changes. Universally praised — one of the safest IR components

co.n: Thieves Can Use Wands
co.no: Makes wands usable by thieves with INT requirement. Pure usability fix. Clean implementation, no conflicts

co.n: Heavy Armor Encumbrance: Variant A
co.no: v18 (component removed — no longer present in item_rev tp2). REMOVED from current IR version.

co.n: Heavy Armor Encumbrance: Variant B
co.no: v18 (component removed — no longer present in item_rev tp2). REMOVED from current IR version.

co.n: Heavy Armor Encumbrance: Variant C
co.no: v18 (component removed — no longer present in item_rev tp2). REMOVED from current IR version.

co.n: Multiclass Divine Weapon Restrictions: Druids Only
co.no: v18 (component removed — no longer present in item_rev tp2). Same as cn:1090 but for Druids only

co.n: Multiclass Divine Weapon Restrictions: Druids Only, Halved Specialization
co.no: v18 (component removed — no longer present in item_rev tp2). Druids only, proficiency capped at **
